title: Restaurant slip in parking lot after shift - likely denied

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Workers' compensation hotline, this is Priya. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: I slipped in the restaurant parking lot last night and twisted my ankle. I want to file workers' comp.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: I can help gather details. Were you clocked in and performing work duties at the time?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: No, I had clocked out and was walking to my personal car after meeting friends for dinner.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Thanks for clarifying. Did the injury happen in an employee-only area or while completing an employer task?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.utterance: No, just in the public parking lot.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Based on that information, this may fall outside workers' compensation because it occurred after shift and not during work duties. I can still document the report for formal review.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Correct, likely non-compensable under workers' comp policy terms. You may wish to check personal health insurance or premises liability options.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.utterance: Absolutely. Reference number WC-640112 has been created with preliminary status: likely denied pending final adjuster determination.
